payload.answer: The proposal involves 500 individual memory cards derived from CSV rows. Due to the volume, direct atomization may introduce noise or redundancy. Options are provided below for user selection regarding ingestion strategy.
citations: LLM proposes 500 memory cards, one per CSV row.
repair_options: Review and approve all 500 cards in batch
Review and approve only specific subsets (e.g., by date or category)
Merge related cards into summary cards to reduce count
Reject and request a more granular or structured input format
Pause and request user confirmation before committing any cards
